what: Stream an AI chat response about the skill from the backend
why: Allows the user to describe what they want to improve and receive a streaming LLM response with suggested revisions

error_handling.criteria: SSE error event with NO_AUTH code
error_handling.action: Display error message in chat pane

error_handling.criteria: SSE error event with LLM_ERROR code
error_handling.action: Display error message in chat pane, allow retry

decisions.reason: Use existing connectSSE utility from lib/sse.ts
decisions.rationale: Consistent with other SSE-based flows. Token-by-token emission provides real-time feedback during generation.
